km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Richard Ashton V於1235年出生在英國。他和Joan de Cliffee至少有1個兒子。他去世於1285年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Ashton V于1235年出生在英国。他和Joan de Cliffee至少有1个儿子。他去世于1285年在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Ashton V was born in 1235, in England. He had at least 1 son with Joan de Cliffee. He died in 1285, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Ashton V est né en 1235, à Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Joan de Cliffee. Il est décédé en 1285, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Ashton V wurde 1235 in England geboren. Er hatte mit Joan de Cliffee mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1285 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Ashton V è nato il nel 1235 nel England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Joan de Cliffee. Morì nel 1285, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Ashton Vは1235年にイギリスで生まれた。彼はJoan de Cliffeeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1285年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Ashton V(은)는 1235년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 Joan de Cliffee(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1285년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Ashton V nasceu em 1235, em Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Joan de Cliffee. Ele faleceu em 1285, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Ashton V родился в 1235 г. в местности Англия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Joan de Cliffee. Он умер в 1285 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Ashton V nació en 1235, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Joan de Cliffee. Murió en 1285, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.

th.1235–Female: ปี1235–ถึงแก่กรรม
